main.appDescription: Select text to open quick tools automatically, or use the shortcut
main.settingsDescription: Configure language, theme, trigger mode, and shortcut.
main.triggerAutoDescription: Show the floating ball after you drag-select or double-click text in any app.
main.triggerShortcutDescription: Select text, then press {{shortcut}} to open the floating ball.
main.triggerDescription: Select text to open automatically, or press {{shortcut}}
main.permissionRequiredHint: Text selection and shortcuts need Accessibility access to work.

settings.shortcutPlaceholder: Press Record, then press a key combination
settings.shortcutHintAuto: No shortcut is needed in auto mode. Record one to use after switching to shortcut mode.
settings.shortcutHintShortcut: Must include a modifier (Ctrl / ⌘, etc.) and must not be taken by another app.
settings.shortcutRegisterFailed: Could not register this shortcut. It may already be in use.

search.title: Quick Search
search.description: Selected text is filled automatically. Press Enter to use the default engine.
search.hintHasQuery: Tip: Search opens in your default browser.
search.hintEmpty: Select text first, or type keywords to start.
